title: geissanthus francoae
intro: Geissanthus francoae, also known as the Franco's Geissanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Primulaceae. It is native to Ecuador and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Geissanthus francoae are often made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
